fields.name: Bio
fields.default:
Jamey has 25 years in the creative industry creating and working on everything from documentary films, small commercial productions, immersive website experiences, marketing activations and event series.

Writing his first short film 'WOOL' is a lifelong, creative dream. He always dreamed of writing stories that you feel and that develop over time.

After writing scripts solely for himself over the past 5 years, he finally decided to make one of those scripts into something real.
